data.body: Claimed and reproduced live (worktree symfix has .venv inside repo root): test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module FAILed with [repo-local, origin=<repo>/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/yaml/__init__.py]. NOTE: recorded file_impact pointed at src/rebar/llm/tools/resolve_symbol.py which does not exist — the real classifier is grounding_tools.resolve_symbol in src/rebar/llm/pai_tools.py (corrected file_impact). Fix: new module-level _environment_roots() (realpaths of sys.prefix/exec_prefix/base_*, site.getsitepackages()+getusersitepackages(), sysconfig purelib/platlib/stdlib/platstdlib) checked BEFORE the repo-root prefix test; an origin under any env root classifies third-party/stdlib even when the venv sits inside the repo. Added tests: test_resolve_symbol_venv_inside_repo_is_third_party (monkeypatched sys.prefix + resolve_in_environment, origin under repo_root/.venv/.../site-packages -> third-party) and test_resolve_symbol_repo_module_still_repo_local (non-regression: repo source origin stays repo-local). All 7 tests in tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py pass in the venv-inside-repo worktree.
